patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
-#define FLASH_PAGE_SIZE   256
+#define FLASH_PAGE_SIZE   512
 #define FLASH_SECTOR_SIZE 4096
 #define FLASH_OK          0
 #define FLASH_ERR_ADDR   -1
description: The FLASH_PAGE_SIZE macro was changed from 256 to 512, breaking all callers that use it to allocate page-sized buffers or compute write addresses.
